item.title: Vem Shuttle Mycelium: The Towel That Kept on Giving, Now in Permanent Retirement
item.description: Crisis deepens as Moonburg elite demand spore-credits for a luxury towel concierge service.

item.title: Gravity Takes a Holiday While Commissioners Delight in a Luggage of Lawsuits
item.description: Amidst cosmic collapse, the Lantern Cascade Gravity Commission triples down on bespoke litigation—while official gravity restoration remains an Everest-sized enigma.

item.title: Xq'thal-Vren Demands Return to Raw Underground: Moisture-Drenched Nostalgia or Bust
item.description: Committee's New Vaporwave Permit Process Leaves Citizens Gasping for Hazy Remnants of the Past.

item.title: Chancellor Nuage-Montfort Declares Re-Shelving Raids a 'Subscription-Stabilizing Triumph'
item.description: In a move reminiscent of gilded ages past, library fees rocket to 4.2 million drachmae while champagne flows freely in the expanding vaults.

item.title: Council of Drifting Aeouia Proclaims Eternal Victory of the Sleeves of Unfashion Decree
item.description: Fashion Sense Flies Off on a Cosmic Drift, Anchored Only by Gasbag Collisions and Bureaucratic Hems.

item.title: Nocturnal Levy Proclaimed a Triumph as Auditors Raid the Dreamscape
item.description: 4,872 Collectors Unleashed in Pursuit of Unreported Reveries While Citizens Sleep Like the Dead

item.title: Ottoman Chain Announces 37-Billion Credit Linen Enforcement Quota Triumph After Towel Shortfall
item.description: Enforcers Celebrate Contractual Compliance as Hotel Guests Remain Unaware of the Steep Linen Price.

item.title: Local Woman Faces Eternal Bureaucratic Loopholes as EarthCorp Takes Over
item.description: The only thing more convoluted than universal acquisition is the paperwork that follows.

item.title: Billionaires Demand More Amenities on Moon After Colonization: 'Where's the Free Shuttle?'
item.description: New residents of Moonburg complain that bioluminescent bathhouses lack sufficient towel service.

item.title: Weightlessness Wonders: Teal-Tower Float Amenities Rated Amidst Stratospheric Lawsuits
item.description: Formerly a leisure activity, now an exclusive ticket to cosmic chaos as gravity takes a genteel dive.
